scripts.verify:static: npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify:static && npm run check:supabase && npm run e2e:storage-hardening && npm run e2e:partner-admin && npm run e2e:ui
scripts.e2e:ui: PITNOW_E2E_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3011 PITNOW_E2E_REUSE_SERVER=0 PITNOW_E2E_WEB_SERVER_COMMAND='npm run build && npm run start' PITNOW_PAYMENT_PROVIDER=FAKE PORT=3011 playwright test
scripts.e2e:ui:fake: PITNOW_E2E_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3011 PITNOW_E2E_REUSE_SERVER=0 PITNOW_E2E_WEB_SERVER_COMMAND='npm run build && npm run start' PITNOW_PAYMENT_PROVIDER=FAKE PORT=3011 playwright test --project=booking-flow-mobile-chromium
